texto: She had a thing for cocky assholes. When they expressed interest in her it seemed meaningful. When nice guys hit on her, she had trouble caring.

texto: She thought the jimster (Jack Daniels) would cure whatever was wrong with her- whatever made her feel like she was in a hall of mirrors, watching herself go through the motions of having a riotous good time
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lucinda Rosenfeld: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “She thought the jimster (Jack Daniels) would cure whatever was wrong with her- whatever made her …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, alcohol, cut-off pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de cut-off e feeling-distant.

texto: Oh, she was okay, just tired, tired of trying to be the one you wanted, the one you couldn't live without, the one you found yourself reaching out an arm for as she teetered from crisis to crisis to crisis only to collapse in your bed at the end of the day, a tortured sylph in black lace. Except she never really was. And you never really did. Or maybe you did for one night. The next night was another matter. It turned out the world was filled with beautiful girls. It turned out being beautiful wasn't nearly enough
explicacao: Citação de Lucinda Rosenfeld sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Oh, she was okay, just tired, tired of trying to be the one you wanted, the one you couldn't live…” articula amor, adolescence, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
